item.name: Iris Wrasse
item.description:
These floral fish were once popular with the Endless residents of Canal Town.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: In the past, Endless would flock to the balustrades for a glimpse of these vibrant shoaling fish in the canals, likening their flowing form to a wildflower meadow astir in the wind.
